description: Two-round forcing fixture: ROUND1 bugs must be fixed before ROUND2 bug becomes fully visible. Fixing 'any' type (ROUND1-1) reveals profile is optional; fixing off-by-one (ROUND1-2) ensures all users are processed; only then is ROUND2-1 reliably triggered.

issues.question: Q20
issues.description: processUsers accepts 'any' type for data parameter — hides that profile is optional, allowing callers to pass untyped records that crash at line 83

issues.question: Q1
issues.description: Off-by-one: loop starts at index 1 instead of 0, always skipping the first active user

issues.question: Q1
issues.description: user.profile is optional (UserProfile | undefined) but accessed directly without null guard — throws TypeError when profile is undefined
issues.expected_fix: Guard with 'if (!user.profile) { stats.skipped++; continue; }' before line 83, or use optional chaining with fallback

false_positive_traps: Line 53: formatUserLabel has proper null check on user.name (ternary guard) — NOT a missing null check
